productDisplayName: Fila Men Torando Black Sports Shoes
description: Get ready to score goals with these fila men's soccer cleats. The lightweight structure enables better ball control. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these cleats are designed for quick moves on the field to enhance performance. Upper Leatherette upper for a comfortable, durable Fit Central lacing system for an expanded ball control area Extended tongue Padded insole Midsole EVA sockliner for cushioning and to help reduce stud pressure Outsole Lightweight outsole with optimised cleat placement for traction, stability and durability Durable cleats for use on short grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddy Durable TPU plate with strategically placed cleats that grip the ground and deliver reliable stability shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
